notes: Two-leg Brent/CAD relative-value basket from the approved BOC-EIA-BRENT-CAD-RSPREAD-2026_S01 card. The EA runs from the XBRUSD.DWX host setfile and reads XBRUSD.DWX and USDCAD.DWX D1 closes to compute a CAD-denominated Brent spread z-score. Q02 must evaluate the logical basket, not the standalone legs.
